positive: A stylized, intricate celestial map featuring bioluminescent deep-sea flora intertwined with geometric nebula patterns. The composition is highly symmetrical and centralized, designed as a seamless circular graphic. Primary colors include deep indigo, sapphire blue, glowing teal, and touches of iridescent gold. Use a clean linework style with strong contrast, reminiscent of mandalas and Art Deco engravings. The background should feel dynamic yet contained, creating a clear, elegant silhouette perfect for apparel printing. Focus on sharp details and smooth gradients. Ultra high definition, vector art aesthetic, glowing particles, perfect symmetry, clean lines.
negative: blurry, out of focus, lowres, grainy, dirty, artifacts, text, watermark, logo, trademark, signature, bad anatomy, poorly rendered hands, extra limbs, noise, messy background, amateur, grayscale
